description.p: Claude Desktop is Anthropic's official desktop client for Claude, an AI assistant trained to be helpful, harmless, and honest. This Linux build is a community repack of the upstream Windows binary, patched for Linux compatibility (frame, tray, Cowork mode, MCP stdio, Quick Entry, etc.).

ul.li: Conversations with the Claude model family (Sonnet, Opus, Haiku)
Projects with persistent context and file uploads
Cowork mode — local agent VM for sandboxed code tasks
MCP (Model Context Protocol) stdio servers for tool integration
System tray, Quick Entry hotkey, and tab system

description.p: The Linux packaging is community-maintained and is not affiliated with Anthropic. See the packaging source and issue tracker linked below.
